name: Rabies
desc:
Your basic attack is a melee attack. You can't equip face armor.
After each battle, gain +2 [img:str] and -1 [img:int].
If your [img:int] is 0 or less, you have Madness.

name: Boils
desc:
+1 Brace.
You spawn a puddle of creep whenever you get hit. You can't equip face armor.

name: Depression
desc: Adjacent units get All Stats Down 2.

name: Broken Limb
desc: You can't equip trinkets or consumables. +2 Thorns.

name: Wrenched Neck
desc: You can't equip neck armor. Double the effects of your head armor.

name: Declawed
desc: You can't equip weapons.

name: Head Trauma
desc: You can't equip head armor. Your Collarless spells cost -2 mana.

name: Deep Cut
desc:
Bleed 1.
You can't equip trinkets or consumables. 
Bonus ability: Bloodzerk.

name: Punctured Eye
desc:
+10% miss chance.
You can't equip face armor. Gain an eyeball trinket.

name: Obsessive Compulsive Disorder
desc:
Bonus Ability: Groom
At the end of your turn, if you didn't use Groom, take 2 damage.

name: Distemper
desc:
At the end of each battle gain +10% crit chance, +25% crit damage, and +5% miss chance. Permanently.
You can't equip face armor.

name: Brain Damage
desc: You can't use item actions. +2 Brace.

name: Severed Thumb
desc: You can't equip weapons. Spawn a Food pickup at the start of each battle.

name: Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder
desc: When you take damage, gain Fear and +2 Damage.

name: Irritable Bowel Syndrome
desc: When you take damage, poop.

name: Dyskinesia
desc: When you end your movement, knockback all adjacent units 1 tile.

name: Anemia
desc:
When you take damage, you have a 10% chance to gain Bleed 1.
Gain 2 Charge for each damage you take from Bleed.

name: Empath
desc:
Take 1 damage when you deal damage.
Your heals heal for 1 extra.

name: Infestation
desc: At the start of your turn, you have a 50% chance to spawn a Maggot Familiar and 15% chance to spawn an enemy Flea.

name: Leprosy
desc: Bruise 2. When you get hit, spawn a food pickup.

name: Acute Stress Reaction: Fight
desc: Gain +6 [img:str] while you have 5 or fewer HP.

name: Acute Stress Reaction: Flight
desc: Gain +6 [img:spd] while you have 5 or fewer HP.

name: Blood Frenzy
desc: When you kill a unit, take an extra turn with Madness.

name: Shunned
desc:
Take your turn last.
Your heals heal for 2 less. +15% dodge chance.

name: Dysentery
desc: 50% chance to make a burning poop directly behind you when you end your turn.

name: Anxiety
desc: +10% Dodge chance. When you take damage, run away from the source.

name: Kamikaze
desc: You explode when you are downed.

name: Traumatophobia
desc: Whenever you take damage, move 1 tile away from the source.

name: Stockholm Syndrome
desc: Whenever you take damage, move toward the source.

name: Violent Outbursts
desc: When you end your turn, dash forward 2 tiles, attack with Knockback, and take 1 damage.

name: Gambling Addiction
desc:
+33% miss chance.
100% critical hit chance.

name: Scleroderma
desc: At the start of each battle, you lose all but 1 HP, but gain that much [img:shield].

name: Pacifist
desc: You can't kill units. If you end your turn without using your basic attack gain 7 mana.

name: Impostor Syndrome
desc: You're quite suspicious…

name: Vegan
desc: You don't eat meat.

name: The Zoomies
desc: Your movement action is a dash attack.

name: Schrödinger's Syndrome
desc: 50% chance to start each battle dead, or alive with max hp and All Stats Up 2 and an extra turn at the start of the battle.

name: Fatty Liver
desc: Whenever you lose HP, you permanently lose 1 [img:con].

name: The Common Cold
desc: Start each battle with All Stats Down. 30% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: Pox
desc: 10% chance to skip your turn to scratch yourself. Your basic attack has a 50% chance to inflict Poison 1. 5% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: Psychosis
desc: After your first turn, you have permanent madness.

name: Necrosis
desc: When you take damage, you get -1 [img:con], -1 [img:str], and spawn poisoned food.

name: Touched
desc: You can no longer heal HP.

name: Charred
desc: Bruise 1. You cannot be Burned.

name: Immortal
desc:
All damage you take is reduced to 1.
When you take damage, suffer a random injury.

name: Bad Gas
desc: On the first round, take your turn last. At the start of that turn, do a Mega Fart attack that inflicts Poison 2.

name: Toxoplasmosis
desc: Start each battle with a Rat Familiar. Your basic attack charms Rat enemies.

name: Ebola
desc:
Start each battle with Bleed 3. Your basic attack inflicts Bleed 2.
5% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: Fidgety
desc: When you end your turn, automatically use your weapon on a random unit in range, for free.

name: Narcolepsy
desc: At the end of your turn, fall asleep, heal 10 HP and gain 7 mana.

name: Paranoia
desc: When a unit ends its movement directly behind you, attack it and gain Fear.

name: Eating Disorder
desc: Double the effects of your consumables but you are confused on how to eat them.

name: Gastritis
desc: At the end of your turn, fart and Poison all adjacent units.

name: Hypomania
desc: Start each battle with 3 bonus turns, then never take a turn.

name: Hypersomnia
desc: Start each battle asleep and with full health.

name: Kidney Stone
desc: When you end your turn take 1 damage and pass a kidney stone.

name: Cancer
desc: At the end of each battle, lose 3 random stats permanently and gain a random mutation.

name: Stinky
desc: Adjacent units move away from you at the start of their turns.

name: Incontinence
desc: When you take damage, pee yourself.

name: Fossilized
desc: +2 Brace. Slide like a rock whenever you get hit.

name: Triskaidekaphobia
desc: Your spells cost 0 mana. The 13th spell you cast on an adventure kills you and destroys your body.

name: Autism
desc: Spells you were born with cost -2 mana. Other spells cost +1 mana.

name: Tourette's Syndrome
desc: At the start of your turn, you have a 33% chance to cast one of your spells at a random target for free.

name: Albinism
desc:
Fire damage you take inflicts +3 Burn.
Your basic attack has a 25% chance to inflict Fear.

name: Sleep Paralysis
desc:
When you fall asleep, a Sleep Paralysis Demon with Madness spawns! You can't wake up until it's killed.
Learn the spell Rest (if you have a free spell slot).

name: Diabetes
desc: When you end your turn, if you haven't eaten food, gain All Stats Down and Confusion 1. Each time you eat food, cleanse all your debuffs and gain +1 [img:int].

name: Bipolar Disorder
desc:
Start each battle with either
 +5 [img:int], +5 [img:cha], and +5 [img:spd]
or 
All Stats Down 2.

name: Soulless
desc: You are immune to buffs and debuffs. When you die, you don't leave a corpse.

name: The Shining
desc:
Your attacks can't miss.
+15% dodge chance and +15% chance to gain Fear at the start of each turn.

name: Addict
desc:
Start each battle with All Stats Down 2.
Gain All Stats Up 3 whenever you eat a pill.
You have a 50% chance to find a pill at the end of each battle.

name: Borrowed Time
desc: +50% dodge chance. Doomed 3.

name: Brave
desc:
Take your turn earlier.
Immune to Fear and Madness.
Attacks against you never miss.

name: Scatological
desc:
Heal 5 HP when you damage poop.
At the start of your turn, if you're near poop, you automatically move toward it and eat it.

name: Necrophage
desc: At the start of your turn, if there's a dead body near you, move towards it and eat it to gain All Stats Up and heal 4 HP.

name: Crohn's Disease
desc: At the end of your turn, you have a 20% chance to poop all over the place!

name: Pica
desc: When you collect a coin or scrap pickup, heal instead of gaining the pickup's normal effect.

name: Feline Aids
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 3 and Weakness 1.
Inflict Poison 3 and Weakness 1 on units that contact you.
Gain -1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd] at the end of each battle permanently.

name: Dyslexia
desc: Swap 3's and 5's in the mana costs and damage values of your spells while in a battle. 6's and 9's are also swapped.

name: Covid
desc:
Start each battle with All Stats Down, Poison 1, and Weakness 1.
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1 and Weakness 1.
15% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: The Flu
desc:
Start each battle with Slow 5 and Weakness 5.
Your basic attack inflicts Slow 1 and Weakness 1.
20% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: Bird Flu
desc:
Start each battle in Mockingbird Form.
You have a 20% chance to recover at the end of each battle.
Contagious.

name: Nudist
desc:
+50% dodge chance.
You can't wear armor.

name: Elephantiasis
desc: At the end of each battle, gain -1 [img:spd] and +2 starting [img:shield] permanently. After 8 battles, gain Trample.

name: Gigantism
desc: Trample.

name: Dwarfism
desc: +10% dodge chance.

name: Sociopathy
desc: You have Madness on your first turn.

name: Munchausen by Proxy
desc: If you have a 2nd disorder, all other cats in your party gain it at the start of each battle.

name: Schizophrenia
desc: At the end of your turn, spawn a hallucination. It has Madness, attacks any unit except you, and fades after its turn.

name: Lycanthropy
desc: 33% chance to enter Wolf Form at the start of your turn.

name: Wobbly Cat Syndrome
desc: 25% chance to block attacks and get knocked back 10 tiles instead.

name: Singleton
desc:
Your max HP and mana are reduced to 1.
Damage you take is reduced to 1.
Your spells cost 1 mana.

name: Insomnia
desc:
You can't fall asleep.
You can move an extra time each turn. Exhaustion sets in on round 3.

name: Phony
desc:
Start each battle with full mana.
You can't regenerate mana.

name: Acid Reflux
desc: Your basic attack becomes a lobbed shot with splash damage but deals 2 damage to you.

name: Spontaneous Combustion
desc: When you take damage from an ability, you have a 15% chance to inflict Burn 5 on yourself and adjacent units.

name: The Hunger
desc:
Your basic attack has lifesteal.
If you don't deal damage to a unit on your turn, gain Madness 1.

name: Paraplegic
desc:
The range of all your movement, dash, and jump abilities are capped at 1 unless they teleport.
Enemies won't prioritize attacking you.

name: Osteogenesis Imperfecta
desc:
+2 Bruise, +2 Bleed Thorns, and +2 Thorns.
When you're downed, you get injured an extra time.

name: Gargantuan
desc: You are permanently immobile.

name: Brain Dead
desc: Gain twice as many stats when you level up. +1 Reroll when leveling up.

name: Tainted Genes
desc: At the end of each battle gain a random mutation. When you're downed, your corpse is destroyed.

name: Sensory Overload
desc: All but your face slot is locked. Your face item's effects are tripled!

name: Sensory Overload
desc: All but your trinket slot is locked. Your trinket's effects are tripled!

name: Sensory Overload
desc: All but your head slot is locked. Your head item's effects are tripled!

name: Sensory Overload
desc: All but your neck slot is locked. Your neck item's effects are tripled!

name: Sensory Overload
desc: All but your weapon slot is locked. Your weapon's effects are tripled!

name: Eternal Youth
desc:
You are a kitten... forever!
+1 [img:comfort], +1 [img:stimulation], +1 [img:appeal]

name: Deja Vu
desc:
10% chance to cancel actions.
[s:.7]Deja Vu will go away when this cat returns to the house.[/s]

name: Williams Syndrome
desc: Your attacks may Charm.

name: Dark One
desc: At end of your turn, deal 1 damage to all units and heal for the damage dealt. Whenever you down an ally gain All Stats Up.

name: ADHD
desc: You have 5 seconds to make decisions, or else this cat acts on its own.

name: Flaming Fists
desc: Your basic attacks inflict Burn 1. Start with Burn 1.

name: Intestinal Prolapse
desc: You receive double damage from behind.

name: Blessing of Glorg
desc: You can unequip cursed items.

name: Black Fetin
desc:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
When an ally cat is downed, restore all your mana.

name: Orange Fetin
desc:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
When you kill an enemy, gain 3 mana and heal 2 hp.

name: Purple Fetin
desc:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
You can reroll your level up options 3 times.
